content.en:
So, Ye Tian shuttled into the sea of flowers.

As soon as he entered the sea of flowers, the fragrance of flowers became stronger, and the power contained in the fragrance of flowers made Ye Tian's will even more unbearable.

"You can only stay for ten minutes at most!"

Ye Tian estimated.

If he stays for a long time, nothing will happen to his body, but he is afraid that his will will collapse, and once his will collapses, this replica body will naturally fall.

These floral scents come from these flowers, why not take some of them?

Just thinking of it, Ye Tian reached out and grabbed a flower.

Click!

This flower was taken away by Ye Tian, but as soon as it was taken away, the flower was annihilated, and it was useless to save it no matter how Ye Tian saved.

And in its place, the flower reappeared.

"Flowers belong to the condensation of the power of the sea of flowers, no matter what, I can't deprive the sea of flowers of power, no matter how many flowers are picked, these flowers will return to the original place. "

Ye Tianming enlightened.

Moreover, the power of the sea of flowers is to annihilate the will, not to temper and impact the will, so there is no way to sharpen one's will in such a place, and it will not be able to improve the effect.

If that's all there is to it, it's of little use to him.

However, Ye Tian still kept shuttling through the sea of flowers to see if there were any other opportunities.

Time passed by second, and Ye Tian was still very calm.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian sensed that a fruit was born in a flower, this fruit was golden, but there were seven points in the 687 gold, each point was of a different color, there were a total of seven colors,

Ye Tian was curious, immediately went over, and reached out to take out the fruit.

He found that the fruit had not collapsed, but was still intact in his hand.

"This fruit is extraordinary!"

Ye Tian realized this.

So, he immediately shuttled out of the sea of flowers and got rid of the influence of the sea of flowers.

At this time, he found that the fruit was still there

"Let's call you Colorful Golden Fruit!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

"How's it going, Endless Lord?"

The Frontier Lord asked curiously.

Ye Tian spread out his hands and said, "The flowers can't be picked, and they will dissipate once they are picked, but I found this fruit and don't know what it is for." "

"This Fruit ......"

The border lord looked at it for a while, but he couldn't see anything anymore.

Ye Tian said again: "This sea of flowers can't sharpen the will, it will only annihilate the will, so the only harvest can only be this kind of fruit, I'll swallow it first, it's a big deal to lose a clone." "

"Then let the Endless Lord give it a try.

The Lord of the Crossing said.

Ye Tian immediately swallowed this colorful golden fruit in one gulp.

Boom ∪!!

The Colorful Golden Fruit was refined by Ye Tianyi and turned into majestic energy, impacting Ye Tian's will.

In an instant, the will of the staggered man absorbed the majestic energy, which was constantly compressed and tempered in the impact, and the will power became stronger and more refined.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai completely refined this Colorful Golden Fruit.

"Endless Lord, how is the effect of this fruit?"

The Frontier Lord asked urgently.

Ye Tian felt it a little and said, "It can temper and compress the will, and my will strength has increased by about one-tenth!"

"What, it's increased by a tenth, and the effect is so good!!"

The Frontier Lord was shocked.

You must know that at their level, it is extremely difficult to improve a little bit of will power, and Ye Tian swallowed such a fruit, and his will power actually increased by one-tenth.

If there were enough fruits, wouldn't they be able to raise their willpower to the extreme of the half-step Eighth Order, and even hope to ascend to the Eighth Order realm.

Rushing!!

Ye Tian and the Border Lord entered the sea of flowers and began to look for this colorful golden fruit.

The sea of flowers covered a large area, and because the power of the flower fragrance annihilated the power of will, it was difficult for Ye Tian and the border lords to explore too many areas at once, so they could only search area by area.

The most important thing is that the colorful golden fruit is wrapped in the flowers, and if you are not careful, you may not notice.

Soon, very soon, it was almost over.

The will of Ye Tian and the border lord was annihilated and changed greatly, and the aura on his body was very weak.

They immediately burst out of the sea of flowers and began to regain their willpower.

"Endless Lord, how many Colorful Golden Fruits have you found?"

The Frontier Lord asked.

"Six!"

Ye Tian said.

"I've found seven!" said the Frontier Lord.

"I refined one just now, this time, I just have six, you have seven, when we refine these colorful golden fruits, let's go in and find other colorful golden fruits!" Ye Tian proposed.

The Frontier Lord nodded, "Yes, just do it." "

They did not take the Colorful Golden Fruit immediately, but first restored their will power, and then refined the Colorful Golden Fruit when their will power was restored, so that they could maximize the energy of the Colorful Golden Fruit.

Time passed, and after a long time, the two of them regained their willpower, and only then did they begin to refine the Colorful Golden Fruit.

One after another Colorful Golden Fruits were refining, and the willpower of Ye Tian and the Border Lord continued to increase.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai refined all the six colorful golden fruits, and his willpower increased by more than half.

Subsequently, they continued to look for the Colorful Golden Fruit

After finding it, start refining the Colorful Golden Fruit.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian and the Border Lord stayed here for tens of thousands of eternal years because of the search for the Colorful Golden Fruit and the refining of the Colorful Golden Fruit, although it was not a very long time, but it was not a short time.

For such a long time, Ye Tian and the border lord had refined many, many colorful golden fruits, and their willpower had increased by at least ten times.

However, they still hadn't reached the Eighth Order Eternal Will.

However, they felt that their willpower had almost risen to the peak of the half-step eighth-order.

Now, there are no colorful golden fruits in the entire sea of flowers, and they have found them several times, but they have not found any more colorful golden fruits.

"Border Lord, let's go, I'm afraid there are no colorful golden fruits here, and it may take a long time to give birth to colorful golden fruits. Ye Tian said.

"Let's go, keep going, maybe there's still a harvest ahead!" the border lord agreed, and began to bypass the sea of flowers and continue to move forward.

Rushing!!

Ye Tian and the Border Lord kept shuttling, and soon crossed the sea of flowers and advanced deeper into the Origin Realm.

Soon.

Ye Tian and the border lord came to another place.

It turned out to be a gray mountain range, stretching endlessly, seemingly running through this piece of heaven and earth.

Ye Tian looked at this gray mountain range and sensed the aura of danger.

"Border Lord, I'm afraid this mountain range is in great danger, I'll go over and take a look first!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

The Frontier Lord nodded slightly.

Wow!

A copy of Ye Tian's body rushed towards the Gray Mountain Range, and at first it encountered no danger.

But as soon as he was fast, he was about to shuttle through the gray mountain range, and suddenly crashed into a long black river, and his body was instantly annihilated. _
